changelog:
🛑 Fixed app crash on startup — AppLock check no longer makes network call without auth token.
📱 Note detail screen now full-screen edge-to-edge — removed Card chrome, padding, and outline.
🔒 Correct PIN still unlocks locked notes offline; PIN no longer wiped on logout.
📵 Offline loop fixed — 'Continue Offline' no longer bounces back to Welcome.
🗑️ Logging out removes account notes while keeping offline notes safe.
✨ Smoother scrolling & navigation — no redundant syncs between screens.
